Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Issuer

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Issuer
public class Issuer extends Object
Issuer

The issuer entity of the alternative investment asset.
